kingdom_guard.name: Kingdom Guard
kingdom_guard.description: The surviving frontier order of Valerion, sworn to hold roads, gates, and watch-posts even after the old kingdom's wider strength has thinned.

merchant_guild.name: Merchant Guild
merchant_guild.description: Caravan masters, ferrymen, and quarter-ledgers who keep the realm stitched together by moving food, tools, and people where the held line still reaches.

hunters_guild.name: Hunters Guild
hunters_guild.description: Trackers and contractors who answer the frontier's beast-work with cold discipline, turning fear into posted duty and clean completion.

thieves_circle.name: Thieves Circle
thieves_circle.description: Smugglers, raiders, and quiet wreckers who profit whenever Valerion's wards slacken and the roads stop trusting themselves.

shrine_keepers.name: Shrine Keepers
shrine_keepers.description: Caretakers, scholars, and ward-servants preserving sacred duty, old records, and the ritual lines still protecting the realm from older dangers.

forest_clans.name: Forest Clans
forest_clans.description: Clan elders, hunters, and wood-settlers who keep the green borders of Valerion passable without surrendering them to neglect, greed, or panic.

cult_of_ash.name: Cult of Ash
cult_of_ash.description: A destructive sect drawn to broken wards, corrupted sanctums, and the belief that the old realm should burn instead of be held.
